creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 170617
Proposed patch (since 415728 revision)

Patch to add some mirrors for games/diaspora port.

The pkg-fallout reported about unavailable Diaspora_R1_Patch_1.1.tar.lzma file:
http://beefy6.nyi.freebsd.org/data/101amd64-default/415751/logs/diaspora-1.1.1.log

Looks like, the file was removed from http://copy.com (maybe, because of inactivity):
http://copy.com/8wo3AQnYu0bj/Diaspora_R1_Patch_1.1.tar.lzma

However, there are some mirrors, still:
http://www.filewatcher.com/m/Diaspora_R1_Patch_1.1.tar.lzma.487141904-0.html
http://www.filewatcher.com/_/?q=Diaspora_R1_Patch_1.1.tar.lzma
